  "findings": [
    "CSST gas piping is not bonded as required by code",
    "Missing bonding jumper to the electrical service grounding electrode system"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an equipment bonding jumper of proper size from the CSST gas piping to the electrical grounding system",
    "Ensure the bonding clamp is listed for the piping material and installed on a metallic pipe or fitting"
  ],
  "rationale": "Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing (CSST) gas piping must be bonded to the electrical service grounding electrode system to prevent electrical arcing and potential fire hazards in the event of a lightning strike or electrical fault.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.104",
    "NEC 250.30"
  ]
}
